texto: The world is a garden of philosophy. God is its gardener
autor: Man is the visitor.And any tree that does not bear fruits of philosophy either does not belong tothat garden or is yet to be grown.
explicacao: Citação de Man is the visitor.And any tree that does not bear fruits of philosophy either does not belong tothat garden or is yet to be grown. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The world is a garden of philosophy. God is its gardener” articula reflexao, kedar-joshi, world em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
